eligibility_summary: All land-holding farmer families get Rs 6000/year in 3 installments. Must have Aadhaar-linked bank account.
Crop insurance at subsidized premium (2% kharif / 1.5% rabi / 5% commercial). Covers yield loss from natural calamities.

scheme_name: Mission for Integrated Development of Horticulture
eligibility_summary: Subsidy for area expansion of fruits vegetables spices flowers. 40% cost for general and 50% for SC/ST. Covers planting material and inputs.
55% subsidy on drip/sprinkler for general farmers and 70% for small/marginal/SC/ST. Per Drop More Crop component.
Covers nursery development protected cultivation organic farming post-harvest management. 50% subsidy on infrastructure cost.
Flexible state-level schemes for agricultural development. Includes infrastructure post-harvest and value addition. Apply through state agriculture department.
40-50% subsidy on purchase of farm machinery and equipment. Custom hiring centres and farm machinery banks. 50% for SC/ST/women/small farmers.
Rs 50000/acre over 3 years for organic farming adoption. Cluster-based approach (50+ farmers). Certification and marketing support included.
Subsidized seed and inputs for rice wheat pulses coarse cereals. Demonstration plots and training. District-specific crop allocation.
Short-term crop loan at 4% interest (with prompt repayment). Covers cultivation and post-harvest needs. Up to Rs 3 lakh at subsidized rate.
Promotes rainfed area development soil health management and water use efficiency. 50% subsidy on micro-irrigation and soil health cards.
Extension services training and capacity building at district level. Farm schools and demonstration plots for technology transfer.
50% subsidy on polyhouse/shade-net construction cost up to 4000 sq m. Higher for hilly areas and NE states. Through NHM/MIDH.
55% subsidy for general and 70% for small/marginal farmers on drip and sprinkler systems. Through PMKSY-PDMC component.

scheme_name: National Mission on Oilseeds and Oil Palm
eligibility_summary: Subsidized seed kits and production inputs for oilseed crops. Oil palm area expansion incentive Rs 29000/ha. Technology demonstrations.

scheme_name: Mission Organic Value Chain Development NER
eligibility_summary: Rs 46000/ha for 3 years for FPO-based organic farming in NE states. Covers certification inputs and market linkage.

scheme_name: National Mission on Agricultural Extension and Technology
eligibility_summary: Integrated extension framework with ATMA SMAM and sub-missions. Training demos and ICT-based advisory. District level implementation.
Price support for pulses and oilseeds through PSS (procurement at MSP) and DPPF (price deficiency payment). Activated when market price falls below MSP.
Rs 1 lakh crore fund for post-harvest management infrastructure. 3% interest subvention on loans up to Rs 2 crore. Covers warehouse cold storage sorting grading and processing units.
60% subsidy on solar pumps (30% central + 30% state). Component A: solar power plants on barren land. Component B: standalone solar pumps. Component C: solarisation of existing pumps.
Online trading platform linking 1361+ mandis across states. Enables transparent price discovery and inter-state trade. No direct subsidy but reduces middlemen.
25-33% subsidy on dairy infrastructure through NABARD refinancing. Covers dairy units milk processing and fodder equipment. SC/ST get higher subsidy.
Rs 18 lakh per FPO for formation and capacity building over 5 years. Equity grant of Rs 2000 per member (max Rs 15 lakh). Credit guarantee for collateral-free loans up to Rs 2 crore.
Financial assistance for export-oriented horticulture. Covers infrastructure quality improvement packing and market development. Supports GlobalGAP and organic certification.
Free soil testing with detailed nutrient analysis and fertilizer recommendation. Every farmer gets soil health card every 2 years. Improves input efficiency.
Digital platform for farmer advisory using AI and data analytics. Multilingual support. Crop planning and weather alerts. Rs 2817 crore budget.
Drone rental for fertiliser and pesticide application through Women SHGs. 80% subsidy on drone cost. Rs 15000/month income for SHG members operating drones.

scheme_name: PM Formalization of Micro Food Processing Enterprises
eligibility_summary: 35% credit-linked subsidy on project cost for food processing units (max Rs 10 lakh). One District One Product approach. Covers equipment and working capital.
50% subsidy on bee colonies equipment and honey processing. Increases crop pollination by 30-40%. Rs 500 per colony support. Ideal alongside orchard crops.
50% subsidy on bamboo plantation (Rs 120/plant over 3 years). Covers nursery development and post-harvest infrastructure. NE states get 90:10 funding.
40% subsidy for general and 60% for SC/ST/women on aquaculture infrastructure. Covers pond construction hatcheries feed mills and cold chain. Rs 20050 crore outlay.
Farm ponds land leveling vermicompost pits and plantation under MGNREGA. 100 days guaranteed wage employment. Convergence with agriculture department for asset creation.
50% subsidy on biogas/bio-CNG plants using cattle dung and crop residue. Converts waste to energy and organic manure. Linked with Swachh Bharat Mission.
Agri-startup incubation with up to Rs 25 lakh funding. Innovation grants and mentorship. Accelerator program for agri-tech startups. Apply through state RKVY cells.
Climate-resilient agriculture for rainfed areas in Maharashtra. 75% subsidy on farm ponds micro-irrigation soil health and crop diversification. World Bank funded.
90% subsidy on mini tractors for SC/ST farmers in Maharashtra. Maximum subsidy Rs 2 lakh. Through MahaDBT portal.
Interest-free crop loans for farmers in Maharashtra. State pays interest component on crop loans up to Rs 3 lakh. Through cooperative and commercial banks.
50% subsidy on farm pond construction in Maharashtra. Individual farm ponds for water harvesting. Maximum subsidy Rs 75000. Linked with MGNREGA convergence.
Farm pond with plastic lining plus drip irrigation plus shade net for rainfed farmers. 80% subsidy for small/marginal (90% SC/ST). Package approach for water security.
Organic farming cluster support in Karnataka. Rs 6200/acre for 3 years covering inputs certification and market linkage. Minimum 50 farmers per cluster.
50% subsidy on farm equipment (power tillers rotavators sprayers) in Karnataka. Higher subsidy for SC/ST and women. Through Raita Mitra portal.
Free solar-powered pumpsets under Chief Minister scheme for Tamil Nadu farmers. 1000 beneficiaries per year. Priority to small and marginal farmers in drought-prone areas.
100% subsidy for small and marginal farmers and 75% for others on drip and sprinkler systems in Tamil Nadu. Highest micro-irrigation subsidy in India.
75% subsidy on fruit and vegetable planting material. Lemon and guava plants for 9 lakh families. Vegetable seed sets for 15 lakh families.
Rs 7000/acre incentive for shifting from paddy to maize cotton and pulses in Punjab. Addresses groundwater depletion. Through state agriculture department.
Rs 1500/acre incentive for adopting Direct Seeded Rice (DSR) instead of transplanting in Punjab. Saves 15-20% water and reduces labour cost.
MSP procurement guarantee for registered farmers in Haryana. Single portal for crop registration and government purchase. Transparent weighing and payment.
Rs 4000/acre incentive for Direct Seeded Rice in Haryana. Higher than Punjab. Targets water conservation in rice-wheat belt.
Income support and crop damage compensation for UP farmers. Rs 6000/year plus additional drought/flood compensation. Linked with state disaster relief.
50% subsidy on farm equipment for UP farmers. Covers pump sets sprayers threshers and mini tractors. Higher subsidy for SC/ST and women.
Price deficiency payment when market price falls below MSP in MP. Difference deposited directly in farmer bank account. Covers soybean pulses and cereals.
Rs 10000/year income support for MP farmers (Rs 4000 state + Rs 6000 PM-KISAN). Two installments of Rs 2000 each from state.
Accident insurance for Rajasthan farmers. Rs 5 lakh for death and Rs 50000 to 2 lakh for injury during agricultural activities. Free coverage.
Zero electricity bill for agricultural pump connections up to 7.5 HP in Rajasthan. Saves Rs 15000-30000/year for average farmer.
Rs 13500/year investment support for AP farmers (Rs 7500 state + Rs 6000 PM-KISAN). Covers input costs for kharif and rabi. Highest combined support in India.
Zero interest crop loans for AP farmers. State reimburses full interest on loans up to Rs 3 lakh. Through cooperative and commercial banks.
Rs 10000/acre/year investment support for Telangana farmers. Two seasons — Rs 5000 each in kharif and rabi. Unconditional — no restriction on crop or input use.
Free life insurance of Rs 5 lakh for Telangana farmers aged 18-59. State pays full premium. Covers natural and accidental death. Nominee gets Rs 5 lakh.
Transport subsidy for agricultural produce in Gujarat. Rs 3/km per quintal for transporting produce to mandis and processing centres. Reduces post-harvest losses.
Solar pump installation with option to sell surplus power to DISCOM at Rs 3.5/unit for 25 years. 60% subsidy on solar pump. Dual income from farming and solar.
Rs 10000/year for farmers with 1+ acre in West Bengal. Two installments in kharif and rabi. Plus Rs 2 lakh life insurance coverage for farmer death.
Rs 12500/year for small and marginal farmers in Odisha. Rs 10000 each for landless agricultural households. Plus life insurance of Rs 2 lakh. Direct benefit transfer.
Rs 500/acre diesel subsidy for irrigation in Bihar. Maximum 8 acres per farmer. Covers kharif and rabi seasons. Through DBT to bank account.
Food self-sufficiency mission promoting fallow land cultivation in Kerala. Subsidized seeds inputs and technical support. Special focus on rice vegetable and tuber cultivation.
